title: Wall Plug (96 Pack) Brown 7 x 42mm or Red 5.5 x 34mm Type Universal Screw Fixing (RED 5.5 x 34mm)
features: HIGH QUALITY FIXING: Universal contract wallplug size: Brown 7 mm or Red 5.5 mm Pack of 96, provides excellent expansion and maximum adhesion for a reliable fixing every time.
SUITABLE FOR: Most materials including concrete, masonry, stone, blocks, plasterboard.
UNIVERSAL: The plugs can be used for walls, ceilings, floors, both hollow, porous and solid materials.
ADVANTAGES: They expand at the top giving instant grip | Anti-rotation features prevent spinning in the hole.
EASY TO STORE: The wall plugs are supplied in strips of 24 making them easy to store in your toolbox or work bag.
description: Product Description Greened House Wall Plugs (96 Pack) Brown 7 x 42mm or Red 5.5 x 34mm Product Description These quality wall plugs come in packs of 96 with a choice of 2 sizes; Brown 7mm or Red 5.5mm. The Plugs are supplied in strips of 24, making them easy to store and find in you toolbox or bag easily. The wall plug is designed to expand at the neck giving instant grip as well as opening wide inside the hole to give a strong reliable fixing. Additional information Type Wall Plugs Colour Red or Brown Pack Size 96 Application Walls, ceilings, floors, both hollow, porous and solid materials.
